data.title: Microservices Structure
data.description: OpenAI's platform uses a microservices architecture to facilitate scalability and deployment.
data.technical_spec: Design pattern: Microservices; Communication: REST, gRPC; Hosted on: AWS, GCP.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Efficient load balancing ensures optimal distribution of incoming requests across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Algorithms: Round Robin, Least Connections; Tools: NGINX, HAProxy.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Handles storage requirements using a combination of relational and NoSQL databases.
data.technical_spec: Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB; Backup: Automated scripts; Replication: Master-slave.

data.title: Containerization
data.description: Utilizing container technology to streamline development and deployment processes.
data.technical_spec: Tools: Docker, Kubernetes; Orchestration: K8s Helm Charts.

data.title: Cache Optimization
data.description: Cache layers improve performance by reducing latency and server workload.
data.technical_spec: Technologies: Redis, Memcached; Strategy: TTL, Lazy Caching.
